title: 10 Signs Your Impulses Are Running You
caption:
A man who can govern himself can be trusted with everything else. A man who can't is a city with no walls — anybody walks in.

Most men don't realize their impulses are running the show. It doesn't feel like that from the inside. It just feels like Tuesday.

The phone the moment the room goes quiet. The avoidance that turns into a three-week fire. The version of yourself you present to strangers that you can't hold at home.

None of it feels dramatic. That's the thing about impulses — they're quiet until they aren't.

"A man without self-control is like a city broken into and left without walls." — Proverbs 25:28.

Save this. Count how many are yours.

#faith #selfcontrol #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #discipline #scripture #proverbs #christianity #mensministry
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
